title: Frost Survive
description: This is a mod pack in which you have to survive in the eternal frost, which arose due to an unknown disaster that nullified the progress of humanity, and it is up to you to restore everything.
body:
# **This mod pack to challenge yourself to survive in difficult conditions.**
 There will be a blizzard and snow everywhere, you will freeze very quickly, so you will need warm clothes made of bear fur or a fire with a cozy home. You need to act quickly, because in addition to the cold, you will also be thirsty.

Much of the build's focus is on Create and its subsequent addons.

If you are going to play with a friend, then you will need to create a walkie-talkie, or radio, to communicate with each other.

For convenience, you can also create a cart and travel with it.

It is planned to finalize the assembly and download new versions. 

*P.S. You can also install Physics Mod for complete immersion*
